Our Brands

Authorized Brands We Carry

We are connected with more than 150 trusted electrical brands. Every product is 100% genuine with full warranty.

Brilliant Electricals

Lighting, wiring accessories, and dependable electrical solutions for homes and businesses

Smarten

Power backup systems, inverters, batteries, and energy solutions

Janaki Cable

Wires and cables for residential, commercial, and industrial electrical projects

Rathi

Cables, wires, switches, and electrical products for residential and commercial use

Halonix

Lighting, lamps, LED products, and energy-efficient electrical solutions

Havells

Switches, wires, fans, lights, MCBs, and distribution boards

Schneider Electric

MCBs, RCCBs, contactors, and automation products

Legrand

Premium modular switches, sockets, and accessories

Philips

LED bulbs, panels, tubes, and outdoor lighting

Anchor by Panasonic

Switches, sockets, fans, and wiring accessories

Finolex

Wires, cables, and electrical conduits

Polycab

Wires, cables, fans, and switches

Syska

LED lights, smart lighting, and personal care electronics

Crompton

Fans, pumps, and lighting products

Bajaj

Fans, LEDs, and small appliances

Orient Electric

Fans, lighting, and home appliances

KEI Industries

Cables and wires for residential and industrial use

Vishal Electro

Electrical supply partner with practical retail and project support.

Powering homes, shops, and projects across Kathmandu Valley

Your trusted electrical products and services partner in Kathmandu Valley. Retail, wholesale, and professional services.
